<MudTabs Elevation="1" @ref="_tabElement" TabPanelsClass="test-active-panel" TabButtonsClass="test-panel-selector" Position="Position.Top">
    @for (int i = 0; i < Tabs.Count; i++)
    {
        int tempIndex = i;

        <MudTabPanel @key="@Tabs[tempIndex].Name" @ref="Tabs[tempIndex].Panel" Text="@Tabs[tempIndex].Name" ID="@Tabs[tempIndex].Tag" @bind-Disabled="@Tabs[tempIndex].Disabled">
            <MudText>@Tabs[tempIndex].Content</MudText>
        </MudTabPanel>
    }
</MudTabs>

@code
{
#nullable disable
    public static string __description__ = "activating tabs should work";
    private MudTabs _tabElement = null!;

    [Parameter]
    public int InitialStartIndex { get; set; }

    public List<TabBindingHelper> Tabs { get; } = [];

    public ActivateDisabledTabsTest()
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
        {
            Tabs.Add(new TabBindingHelper { Name = (i + 1).ToString(), Disabled = true, Tag = new DummyPlaceHolder { Id = Guid.NewGuid() }, Index = i, Content = $"Tab Content {i + 1}" });
        }
    }

    public Task ActivateAllAsync()
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() =>
        {
            foreach (var item in Tabs)
            {
                item.Disabled = false;
            }

            StateHasChanged();
        });
    }

    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        base.OnParametersSet();

        Tabs[InitialStartIndex].Disabled = false;
    }

    public Task EnableTabAsync(int index)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() =>
        {
            Tabs[index].Disabled = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        });
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(int index, bool ignoreState)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(index, ignoreState));
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(int index)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(index));
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(MudTabPanel panel, bool ignoreState)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(panel, ignoreState));
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(MudTabPanel panel)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(panel));
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(DummyPlaceHolder id, bool ignoreState)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(id, ignoreState));
    }

    public Task ActivateTabAsync(DummyPlaceHolder id)
    {
        return InvokeAsync(() => _tabElement.ActivatePanelAsync(id));
    }

    public class TabBindingHelper
    {
        public required string Name { get; set; }

        public required bool Disabled { get; set; }

        public required DummyPlaceHolder Tag { get; set; }

        public MudTabPanel Panel { get; set; } = null!;

        public required int Index { get; set; }

        public required string Content { get; set; }
    }

    public class DummyPlaceHolder
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
    }
}

Implemented the MudTabs `Disabled` enhancement.

Changes made:
- Added a new `[Parameter] public bool Disabled { get; set; }` to `MudTabs`.
- Updated MudTabs behavior so parent-level `Disabled` is treated as disabling every child panel:
  - tab CSS disabled state
  - activation checks
  - nearest enabled panel lookup
  - keyboard focus navigation
  - drag/drop item disabled predicate
  - icon color disabled handling

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test confirming `Disabled=true` on `MudTabs` disables all child tabs and prevents activation.
- Ran the regression test successfully.
- Removed the temporary test as requested by restoring the unit test file.
